title: RECOMBINANT FABI ENZYME FOR DETECTION OF KLEBSIELLA PNEUMONIAE INHIBITORS AND METHOD THEREOF
author: Biswas, Soumya
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The present invention relates to a novel recombinant enzyme for the detection of inhibitors of Klebsiella pneumoniae, a pathogenic bacterium, and a novel recombinant enzyme-based method for the detection of inhibitors of Klebsiella pneumoniae using enzyme inhibition assay.
steps_raw: The present invention relates to a novel recombinant enzyme for the detection of inhibitors of Klebsiella pneumoniae, a pathogenic bacterium, and a novel recombinant enzyme-based method for the detection of inhibitors of Klebsiella pneumoniae using enzyme inhibition assay.
